memoryArtifacts.headline: Essex England 1550 era
memoryArtifacts.description:
number in red on the map
1. "The Ray" Farmlands of Raynalde Marvin Sr on this (then) peninsula in 1554
2. Location of his house in Wrabness, bequeath to his eldest son Edward, father of Matthew and Reinhold Marvin. 
3. "Ramsey Street"
4. Ramsey Bridge shown by the lines crossing the river. 
5. Estate and home of Reinhold Marvin, the younger, was in this vicinity. 
6. Parish were Matthew and Reinold Marvin were Christen and the father died. 
7. Parish were their elder brother, Edward died.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Essex England 1900 era
memoryArtifacts.description:
The heavy line from Harwich ends at the southwest "corner" Which was the home of Edward Marvin.
"Spinels" adjoined it on the west. Spinels, Ramsey and Great Bentley are underlined.  "Sturwood" and East Hall" are near the Harwich Branch RR on the south bank of the Stour.

popularStory.description: When Rynald, son of John and Margaret Mervyn was born about 1513 and was christened in the Church of St Michael the Archangel at Ramsey.  This church was built about 1100 after the Norman conquest.  I …

zh.Saint Michael, Ramsey, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可拉姆齊
zh.Ramsey,Essex,England: 英國英格蘭艾可拉姆齊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rynalde Mervyn於1513年出生在英國英格蘭艾可拉姆齊時，他的父親John Mervyn34歲，母親Margaret31歲。他於1544年10月24日與Johanna在英國艾可拉姆齊結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1533年在英國艾可拉姆齊被列為yeoman。他去世於1556年12月10日之後在英國艾可拉姆齊，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可拉姆齊。

zh-hans.Ramsey,Essex,England: 英国英格兰艾可拉姆齊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rynalde Mervyn于1513年出生在英国英格兰艾可拉姆齊时，他的父亲John Mervyn34岁，母亲Margaret31岁。他于1544年10月24日与Johanna在英国艾可拉姆齊结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1533年在英国艾可拉姆齊被列为yeoman。他去世于1556年12月10日之后在英国艾可拉姆齊，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可拉姆齊。

nameMeanings.name: Mervyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Marvin
meanings: English (mainly Leicestershire and Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Merefin, Merevin, Old English Merefin. This is probably formed with Old English mere ‘sea’ + Finn (a personal name derived from the ethnic name). Alternatively, it may be a borrowing of an unrecorded Old Norse name Møra-Finnr.
Slovenian: nickname from marvin, the name of a tart light red wine.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Rynalde Mervyn was born in 1513, in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Mervyn, was 34 and his mother, Margaret, was 31. He married Johanna on 24 October 1544, in Ramsey, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. In 1533, his occupation is listed as yeoman in Ramsey, Essex, England. He died after 10 December 1556, in Ramsey, Essex, England, and was buried in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rynalde Mervyn est né en 1513, à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mervyn, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Johanna le 24 octobre 1544, à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. En 1533, sa profession de son indiquée est yeoman à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre. Il est décédé après 10 décembre 1556, à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rynalde Mervyn 1513 in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mervyn 34 und seine Mutter Margaret 31. Er hat am 24. Oktober 1544 in Ramsey, Essex, England Johanna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1533 ist sein Beruf als yeoman in Ramsey, Essex, England aufgeführt. Er starb nach 10. Dezember 1556 in Ramsey, Essex, England und wurde in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rynalde Mervyn è nato il nel 1513 nel Ramsey, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Mervyn, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Johanna il 24 ottobre 1544, nel Ramsey, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1533, la sua occupazione è indicata come yeoman nel Ramsey, Essex, England. Morì dopo il 10 dicembre 1556, nel Ramsey, Essex, England, e fu sepolto a Ramsey, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Saint Michael, Ramsey, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスラムセイ
ja.Ramsey, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスラムセイ
ja.Ramsey,Essex,England: イギリスイギリスエセックスラムセイ
ja.lifeSummary: Rynalde Mervynが1513年にイギリスイギリスエセックスラムセイで生まれた時，父John Mervynは34歳，母Margaretは31歳であった。1544年10月24日にイギリスエセックスラムセイでJohannaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1533年，イギリスエセックスラムセイでの職業はyeomanと記録されている。彼は1556年12月10日以後にイギリスエセックスラムセイで死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスラムセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rynalde Mervyn(이)가 1513년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 램지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mervyn(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1544년 10월 24일 영국 에세스 램지에서 Johanna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1533년, 그의 직업은 영국 에세스 램지에서 yeoman이었다. 그는 1556년 12월 10일 이후 영국 에세스 램지에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 램지에 묻혔다.

pt.from 16 September 1533 to 17 December 15: de 16 de setembro de 1533 a 17 de dezembro de 1533
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rynalde Mervyn nasceu em 1513, em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Mervyn, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna em 24 de outubro de 1544, em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1533, sua profissão aparece como yeoman em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu após 10 de dezembro de 1556, em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rynalde Mervyn родился в 1513 г. в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Mervyn было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna 24 октября 1544 г. в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1533 году он работал по профессии yeoman в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия. Он умер после 10 декабрь 1556 г. в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rynalde Mervyn nació en 1513, en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Mervyn, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Johanna el 24 de octubre de 1544, en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1533, su ocupación registrada era yeoman en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Murió después de 10 de diciembre de 1556, en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
